utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 items. Each one contains the required details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health insurance with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services includes enhancement services with costs; total_budget provides a complete monthly and annual breakdown. All items are fully specified.
